businessQuestion: Which months have the highest return rates?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DD.FISCAL_MONTH,
    SUM(FR.UNITS_RETURNED) AS RETURN_UNITS,
    SUM(FS.UNITS_SOLD) AS SOLD_UNITS,
    ROUND(
        SUM(FR.UNITS_RETURNED)/
        NULLIF(SUM(FS.UNITS_SOLD),0)*100,2
    ) AS RETURN_RATE_PCT
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_RETURNS FR
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_SALES FS
ON FR.PRODUCT_KEY=FS.PRODUCT_KEY
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_DATE DD
ON FR.DATE_KEY=DD.DATE_KEY
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY RETURN_RATE_PCT DESC;
businessContext: Operations teams want to identify seasonal spikes in returns.
